details.attacks: d100 x needle (1 damage per needle)
details.special: PSI: Invisibility, Kinetic Shield, Mind Bar, Telekinesis WT: Chameleon Power, Control Sound Powers: 10 Rank 2nd Infravision: 90’ Breath weapon: 10’ long line of acid, 2d10 damage (save versus breath for half). Resistance to non-metal weapons: Only suffer 1 point of damage to non-metal or non-magical weapons. **: Each Hit Die counts for 10 square feet of the plant Plant Needles: Brambleweed does no

system.description:
Brambleweed is a thick, thorny, vine-like plant that grows with incredible speed, creating an almost impassable wall around sources of water in the desert.
